title: [Apache Flink 1.4.1 Released](</2018/02/15/apache-flink-1.4.1-released/>)
summary:
#  Apache Flink 1.4.1 Released
February 15, 2018 -
The Apache Flink community released the first bugfix version of the Apache Flink 1.4 series.
This release includes more than 60 fixes and minor improvements for Flink 1.4.0. The list below…
